run_metadata.notes: Scoped re-audit: DDL migration only; no application runtime paths in scope.

agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Find runtime errors, logic bugs, null-safety violations, and async race issues.

next_actions.action: Regression: ensure UI and APIs tolerate NULL created_by / parent_id / registry_version after user or parent row deletion
next_actions.rationale: ON DELETE SET NULL changes delete semantics vs NO ACTION; callers must not assume those columns are always non-null.
